findings.issue: MIRT upgrade not implemented — 8 independent 3PL models still in use, violating ADR-004 and blocking unified competency correlation
findings.recommended_fix: Rewrite assessment engine to use multidimensional IRT with shared theta across 8 competencies. Update schema to output composite vector. Estimated: 150 lines in assessment_engine.py, 30 in schemas.py
